zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Baden於1225年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾利希格時，她的父親Hermann V. von Baden61歲，母親Irmengard vom Rhein25歲。她於1253年之前與Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年3月20日在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Baden于1225年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾利希格时，她的父亲Hermann V. von Baden61岁，母亲Irmengard vom Rhein25岁。她于1253年之前与Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1282年3月20日在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Baden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Danish: patronymic from   Bade  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably an adoption of the German surname (see 1 above).

English: habitational name from a place called Bayden in Sussex, which is referred to in 17th-century documents but unlocated (it is possibly to be identified with Bainden, a manor in Mayfield, Sussex), or from Baydon in Wiltshire. The latter is from Old English beg + dūn, meaning ‘berry hill’.

variants.name: Bade
meanings: English (North Yorkshire) and Scottish: probably from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Bad(d)a, which is perhaps a short form of various compound names with the first element beadu ‘battle’.
North German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed with badu ‘strife, battle’.
North German: occupational name from Middle Low German bade ‘messenger’.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Baden was born in 1225, in Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, her father, Hermann V. von Baden, was 61 and her mother, Irmengard vom Rhein, was 25. She married Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG before 1253. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 March 1282, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Baden est née en 1225, à Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Hermann V. von Baden, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Irmengard vom Rhein, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG avant 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1282, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Baden 1225 in Lichtenberg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann V. von Baden 61 und ihre Mutter Irmengard vom Rhein 25. Sie hat vor 1253 Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1282 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Baden è nata il nel 1225 nel Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, sua padre, Hermann V. von Baden, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Irmengard vom Rhein, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG prima del 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1282, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Badenが1225年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンリチテンバーグで生まれた時，父Hermann V. von Badenは61歳，母Irmengard vom Rheinは25歳であった。1253年以前にLudwig II VON LICHTENBERGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1282年3月20日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Baden(이)가 1225년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 리트버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann V. von Baden(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irmengard vom Rhein(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1253년 이전 Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 3월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Baden nasceu em 1225, em Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Hermann V. von Baden, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Irmengard vom Rhein, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG antes 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1282, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Baden родилась в 1225 г. в местности личтенбирг, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Hermann V. von Baden было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Irmengard vom Rhein, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG перед 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 марта 1282 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Baden nació en 1225, en Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Hermann V. von Baden, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Irmengard vom Rhein, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG antes de 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1282, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
